aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.description: Tử Vi Academy is the leading Zi Wei Dou Shu training platform.

homeHero.headline: Understand fate, understand timing, then choose your next step clearly.
homeHero.description: Zi Wei is a framework for reading the relationship between people and their life path with care, structure, and enough realism for everyday decisions.

intro.title: A system for reading life through structure, not superstition.
intro.description: Zi Wei Dou Shu is presented as a discipline with logic: it has roots, rules, operating principles, and practical value for understanding yourself, understanding timing, and living more clearly.
intro.imageCaption: The image is only a visual layer for the academic mood, not the main content.

items.title: Know yourself, know others
items.description: See strengths, blind spots, and areas that need support so you understand yourself more clearly.

items.title: Read cycles by phase
items.description: See major and minor luck cycles as a timeline so you can prepare before changes arrive.

items.title: Move past superstition
items.description: A proper reading helps avoid blind rituals, unfounded fortune-telling, and vague interpretations.

items.title: Guide self-cultivation
items.description: See obstacles more clearly so you can focus on inner discipline, good action, and deliberate timing.

benefits.title: Zi Wei is only useful when it helps people live more clearly.
benefits.description: This section condenses the practical value into 4 short points so readers can scan it quickly instead of reading a long block of copy.
items: Understand the nature of the system to avoid misunderstanding it.
Read the relationship between fate, structure, stars, and palaces.
Recognize high and low phases so you can respond before change hits.
Use the result as a tool to adjust actions.

cta.title: Zi Wei is a reasoning tool for living clearly, not a place to look for magic.
cta.description: When people understand a chart, they can see their path more clearly, avoid superstition, and move forward with more agency.

thuvien.title: Library
thuvien.description: Explore the knowledge base on stars, palaces, structures, and deeper meaning inside Zi Wei Dou Shu. Written for modern researchers with high accuracy.

shared.loginRequiredDescription: This page requires authentication before you can enter.
shared.loginRequiredBody: Please sign in to open private pages, save your profile, and continue using personalized features.

form.title: Build a Birth Chart
form.description: Enter birth date and time to generate a Zi Wei chart, read the Life Palace, Body Palace, 12 palaces, and major cycles in a clear, compact way.
form.importantDescription: This engine prioritizes the Zi Wei Dou Shu structure: Life Palace, Body Palace, 12 palaces, major stars, minor stars, and luck cycles. Solar dates are converted by timezone; lunar dates are interpreted directly from the local birth time.

preview.noMajorStars: No major stars in this palace
preview.emptyDescription: Enter the information on the left to set the Life Palace, Body Palace, lay out the 12 palaces, and generate the Zi Wei star set.
preview.noSummary: No data to interpret yet. When calculation completes, this area will summarize the Life Palace, Body Palace, structure, and career axis.
preview.waitingMajorStars: Waiting for the main star set.

profile.title: Adjust personal information and chart data in one private space.
profile.description: This page stores your default profile locally on this device, syncs with the account menu in the navbar, and keeps birth data, time zone, and chart notes consistent.
profile.lunarNotesPlaceholder: Enter lunar notes, birth milestones, or private notes
profile.storageNote: Data is stored locally and will appear in the account menu after saving.
profile.tip: Tip: if you just built a new chart, press Load latest chart to pull the birth data into this profile.
profile.storageDescription: This profile is stored only in the current browser. You can update it at any time without affecting your saved chart history.
